def negative_django_values_vs_full_model_in_loop():
    rule_id = "django_values_vs_full_model_in_loop"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Django loops hydrate full model instances where values(), values_list(), or only() would likely be cheaper."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
